headline: Qiagen M&A Fever Builds: KKR, EQT, Advent Explore Possible Takeover
summary: Private equity giants circle Qiagen (QGEN) with potential bids of $50/share. Get the details on the molecular diagnostics buyout.

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on KKR, Raises Price Target to $124
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Budish   maintains KKR (NYSE:KKR) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $122 to $124.
